code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let trimmed = string.trim(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  let n = toks.len()
  while i < n
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 2
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
